channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 69A: Traffic accident
item.description: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: 52: Harmful vehicle
item.description: After a driving disability, there are different intervals. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After a driving disability, there are different intervals.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: 15A: Police operation

item.content:encoded:
Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: police operation.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: U3: Delays
item.description: Irregular intervals towards Simmering. Reason: Harmful vehicle. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Irregular intervals towards Simmering. Reason: Harmful vehicle.
[On 22.05.2026]

item.title: 1: Impairment of false parkers
item.description: Disability in the direction of Prater Hauptallee. Estimated duration: 11:00. Reason: False parker in the area Radetzkystraße. [On 22.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Disability in the direction of Prater Hauptallee. Estimated duration: 11:00. Reason: False parker in the area Radetzkystraße.
[On 22.05.2026]
